foundation.theorem: one machine-checked self-proven theorem: there is no nothing
foundation.trace: One -> fold -> exact alpha/beta rational angles -> registered peptide geometry -> generated signed quartet modes; One -> b = 2 and c = 3 -> four-residue orientation union; generated mode relation -> v5 quartet topology -> v3 complete-prefix topology

signed_orientation_relation.geometric_readout: signed scalar triple product of three consecutive generated C-alpha steps divided by the product of their generated lengths
signed_orientation_relation.generated_alpha_signature: computed at runtime from the exact alpha fractions through tools/protein_backbone_geometry_v1.py
signed_orientation_relation.generated_beta_signature: computed at runtime from the exact beta fractions through tools/protein_backbone_geometry_v1.py
signed_orientation_relation.precursor_rule: before four C-alpha points exist, preserve paths nearest a consistent alpha or beta preimage by exact circular 24-lattice step count
signed_orientation_relation.reflection_property: the signed readout changes sign under spatial reflection, unlike the v5 distance topology

primary: absolute distance to the nearer runtime-generated alpha/beta signed orientation mode; exact lattice precursor distance before the quartet exists
terminal orientation-quartet hydrophobic dispersion relative to its generated background
terminal orientation-quartet radius squared relative to its endogenous adjacent step
secondary: complete-prefix hydrophobic dispersion relative to its generated background
complete-prefix radius squared relative to its endogenous adjacent step

frontier_optimization.rule: sort all candidates by the complete primary local key; compute the complete-prefix secondary key only for candidates at or below the 24th local-key boundary, including every boundary tie
frontier_optimization.exactness: a candidate above the 24th primary-key boundary cannot enter a 24-state frontier under any secondary key
frontier_optimization.purpose: preserve the exact v6 lexicographic selector while avoiding complete-prefix construction for excluded candidates

component_routes.alpha_beta_angles: DIRECT exact fold preimages in constants/protein_folding_3d.ep
component_routes.24_lattice: forward-forced exact finite state constitution from the protected construction
component_routes.peptide_geometry: named forward-forcing constitution with byte-exact protected-witness replay

status: development relation awaiting source-bound applied protein data
